name: ethos
description: Use Ethos for GTM prospecting, enrichment, tables, agent columns, campaigns, and a cross-channel LinkedIn/Gmail campaign inbox.

interface.shortDescription: GTM prospecting, enrichment, campaigns, and campaign replies.
interface.longDescription: Use Ethos through a remote OAuth-backed MCP server. Find prospects, enrich contacts, create agent columns, build and launch LinkedIn/email campaigns, and safely review or reply to campaign conversations across LinkedIn and Gmail without importing organic mailbox history.
defaultPrompt: Use Ethos to find RevOps leaders at US B2B SaaS companies.
Use Ethos to enrich work emails for a people table.
Use Ethos to add leads from a people table to a campaign.
Use Ethos to build an email and LinkedIn campaign from my people table.
Use Ethos to review my unread LinkedIn and Gmail campaign replies.
